title: “Those who are  greatly affected by the  serious  economic crisis are the most ordinary citizens and the poorest of this country and we don’t seem to think about them or care about them.”- MA Sumanthiran MP in Parliament
body_lines: (Text of Speech  made in Parliament by TNA Jaffna District Parliamentarian  M.A. Sumanthiran on 08h June 2022)
Thank you Hon. Presiding member for the opportunity to speak at this debate on the statement made by the Hon. Prime Minister yesterday and the Motion for supplementary estimate.

The country is looking to the parliament today for answers to an unprecedented economic crisis that the country is facing. Each time this parliament meets people have had expectations that there would be some change, some forward movement to resolve this crisis.

And the people are disappointed because, this was a parliament when it was constituted or soon thereafter had two third‘s support for the government, and with that 2/3rd support that they gathered together, they brought an amendment to the constitution, the 20th amendment, and strengthened the hands of the President, which was by the 19th Amendment taken back to Parliament somewhat, that was reversed.

And the President’s own election manifesto in 2019, the “Vistas of Prosperity and splendor”… I urge everyone in this country to read that manifesto. You will die laughing before you actually die of hunger, if you read that manifesto and compare it to the state that the country is in today.

In the manifesto, before I deal with other matters; the one very specific proposal that he made, is at page 36 and 37 in the English version of the manifesto, where at page 37, he very specifically says “income tax will be reduced, economic service charge and withholding tax will be scrapped. A simple value added tax of 8 % will be introduced, replacing both the current VAT of 15 % and the Nation building tax of 2 %, payee tax will be scrapped and personal income tax will be subject to a ceiling of 15 %. 5-year moratorium will be granted on taxes payable by agriculturist and small and medium enterprises” and so on.
Huge tax reliefs announced even in his election manifesto – it was an election promise. I want to table those two pages, titled chapter 5 “People Centric economy” page 36 and 37. I am tabling it.

At that time itself, the finance minister of this country, Hon. Mangala Samaraweera, specifically addressed this election promise and he stated that if this proposal is implemented – he did that on 19th of October 2019 – he addressed a press conference on 19th of October 2019, and he addressed this issue of these promises that candidate Gotabaya Rajapaksa gave this country.

And what did Finance Minister Mangala Samaraweera say? He said, “If these are implemented Sri Lanka will become like Lebanon and Venezuela. Sri Lanka will become like Lebanon and Venezuela. Unfortunately, or fortunately for him, Hon. Mangala Samaraweera is not with us today, but his prediction has come true, his warning has come true.

On the 30th of October 2019 he tweeted, it’s still there in Twitter, and I am going to table Mangala Samaraweera’s tweet made on the 30th of October 2019. This is what he said, “Gota’s tax plan wants to set Sri Lanka on an express train to bankruptcy, default and a Greek styled debt crisis. That change alone equivalent to heath, defense or pensions budgets. Certainly doesn’t need advice for PR agencies conjured business communities”.

I am tabling Hon. Magala Samaraweera’s tweet on 30th October 2019 also to be included in the Hansard. So, one cannot say that there were no warnings. The Finance Minister of the country at that time said this.

Hon. Prime minister now wants to set up a parliamentary budget office. During the last Parliament we had that draft and all of that was set up but it was never presented to Parliament. Recently he asked me for the draft and I have sent it to him, and hope that will be done.

One of the tasks of the Parliamentary budget office is that, when due for an election somebody makes a promise – an election promise – the Parliamentary budget office will have to immediately calculate the impact of that promise and publish a report saying, this is how it will impact the economy.

Unfortunately, we did not have the Parliamentary budget office to say that, but nevertheless the minister of finance said it more than once. But voters were duped, voter were told a strong country, a strong leader, what do we have today a strong leader? What do we have today? We need a strong leader to invoke that sentiment amongst the voters, an Easter Sunday attacks was also carried out earlier, and voters were duped.

And this tax cuts were actually implemented in December 2019 and was the single most reason why we are in this predicament today. I am not saying that’s the only reason, but that was the trigger, because it was only after that, beginning April 2020 that our ratings started falling. When the rating started falling, the Central bank under the Monetary law gave confidential reports and I believe, it cautioned the government, that we will not be able to borrow anymore and by July/August 2020, we were shut out of International Financial markets.

And that’s it! That’s what happened. So the person who is single handedly responsible for this economic crisis is still the head of government. He is still president, some people are saying, “No. no. don’t look at this Politics – let that be – deal with the economic crisis”… yes of cause, to deal with the economic crisis the wrong-doer must be removed.

You can’t keep the wrong-doer, the one who is mostly responsible in that chair and deal with the crisis. How can he do that? Why did the Prime Minster resign? Why did the entire cabinet resign? Why did the governor of the Central bank resign? Why did the secretary to the treasury resign? Why did all of that happen? Why did, suddenly, 40 or 42 members who were seated in the government benches declare themselves to be independent?
Now this is the new vogue. This Parliament no longer consist of a government side and an opposition side, this Parliament now consist of independent MPs – Independent MPs – new fashion.

Each one stands up says I am independent, as if that is some big thing, some virtuous thing. You need to be independent anyway, that’s another matter, but our system is that of a government and opposition. That is why we have an Aisle in the centre – that is why our Standing Orders say that we can’t cross that aisle unless we are crossing over – we are changing sides. It doesn’t even say that. It merely says you can’t cross that aisle. This Parliamentary system is one where you have two sides. This Parliamentary system is not one where you have independent MPs. This Parliament has failed if it says everybody sitting here is an independent MP. That is not our system.

So therefore the President must definitely step down, there might be some interim relief that he has got by Hon. Ranil Wickramasinghe running and taking the position of Prime Minister. Where in the Parliamentary democracy do you have this kind of Prime Minister?

A single MP. From his party only one person, that’s to give relief to the government that’s in sixes and sevens. The President has lost his mandate, the President is the wrong-doer who caused this huge economic calamity, so he must move, he must step down. Or he must be removed.

The Parliament also has lost its mandate. 2/3rds you had; what do you have now? Groups within the government, so and so’s group, the other person’s group, another person’s group or calling themselves independent MPs. Parliament has lost its legitimacy, parliament has lost its mandate. There must be an overhaul of this system. But before that, parliament also needs to be dissolved, it is anyway dissolved into independents. It has been dissolved, I mean in actual fact it is dissolved. So at least formally you must dissolve it now.

So I say to those out there who think that this is merely playing politics: No! it is not. Until you set this right, until you set this right you are not going to even begin to address the economic issue. Every institution has told this country “you know there must be Political stability” how do you have Political stability with this parliament of independent MPs? you have no stability at all.

We must understand that we are part of a problem now, we are unable to give solutions, people are looking to us for solutions. We are not doing that. We are only crying about our houses being burnt, we are only crying about this and that and the other. We are not giving any solutions. And we can’t give solutions so long as his kind of political instability continues in this country. And every day of delay, every day of delay in establishing stability costs the country several million Dollars. Every day’s delay.
So it must be fixed fast  We are part of a problem, we must say “Yes, we’ll dissolve ourselves”, pass a resolution and request the President to dissolve Parliament.

One of the biggest promises given by the President himself in the last address to the Nation, he said so, and by the Prime Minister very categorically, stated, that they will do 2 things, that they will bring back the 19th amendment, the 20th amendment you brought with such fan fare, the former minister of justice is here, he moved that bill and suddenly he said “no, no, 20th is bad, now we will change it, we will abandon it, we’ll repeal it, we’ll bring back the 19th.

And then we’ll start the process, of abolishing executive presidency itself.” Both the President and the prime minister within the last two weeks have given the country that assurance. But where are you now? You can’t even bring back the 19th amendment. Some draft was produced, discussed with us, members of the opposition, the party leaders, with all kinds of dilution. We said alright, still do it, do it! what happened on Monday at the Cabinet meeting?

Nothing has come out, you are unable to even give effect to that promise. A highly watered down version of bringing back the –  you call it the 21st, 21st is what Hon. Ranjith Maddumabandara has presented to Parliament, that is a substantial one.

Then at least give support to that to be passed if you are serious about your promises. If you are unable to finalize the draft, if you have no unanimity in the cabinet to do that. So cabinet has failed, this Parliament is unable to do anything because there is no one side that can support any reform.

If we are to move from this, this relief budget will be most welcomed but we will have to look at it to see what there is in it. We are waiting to see what your draft amendment to the constitution is. We will have to wait for it. But the longer we wait, the more serious the economic crisis is, and the ones who are affected by that are the most ordinary citizens and the poorest of this country and we don’t seem to think about them or care about them.

si.title: “බරපතල ආර්ථික අර්බුදයෙන් විශාල වශයෙන් පීඩාවට පත්වන්නේ මේ රටේ සාමාන්‍ය පුරවැසියන් සහ දුප්පත්ම ජනතාව වන අතර අපි ඔවුන් ගැන සිතන බවක් හෝ ඔවුන් ගැන සැලකිල්ලක් දක්වන බවක් නොපෙනේ." - පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රී එම්ඒ සුමන්තිරන්
body_lines: (2022 ජූනි 08 වැනි දින දෙමළ ජාතික සන්ධානයේ යාපනය දිස්ත්‍රික් පාර්ලිමේන්තු මන්ත්‍රී එම්.ඒ. සුමන්තිරන් විසින් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේදී කරන ලද කතාවේ පාඨය)
ස්තුතියි ගරු. ගරු මන්තී‍්‍රවරයා විසින් කරන ලද ප‍්‍රකාශය පිළිබඳ මෙම විවාදයේ දී අදහස් දැක්වීමේ අවස්ථාව සඳහා මුලසුන දැරූ මන්තී‍්‍ර අගමැති ඊයේ සහ පරිපූරක ඇස්තමේන්තු යෝජනාව.

රට මුහුණ දී සිටින පෙර නොවූ විරූ ආර්ථික අර්බුදයකට පිළිතුරු සෙවීම සඳහා රට අද පාර්ලිමේන්තුව දෙස බලා සිටී. මේ පාර්ලිමේන්තුව ජනතාව හමුවන සෑම අවස්ථාවකදීම මේ අර්බුදය විසඳා ගැනීමට යම් වෙනසක්, ඉදිරි ගමනක් සිදුවනු ඇතැයි අපේක්ෂා කළා.

ඒවගේම ජනතාව කලකිරිලා ඉන්නේ, මේක පිහිටුවනකොට පාර්ලිමේන්තුවක් නිසා හෝ වැඩි කල් නොගොස් ආණ්ඩුවට තුනෙන් දෙකේ සහය ලැබුණු නිසා, ඒ 2/3 සහයෝගය එක්ක එකතුවෙලා 20 වැනිදා ව්‍යවස්ථා සංශෝධනයක් ගෙනාවා. සංශෝධනය කර ජනාධිපතිවරයාගේ දෑත් ශක්තිමත් කළ අතර එය 19 වැනි සංශෝධනයෙන් තරමක් දුරට පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට ගෙන ගිය අතර එය ආපසු හැරවිය.

එමෙන්ම 2019 වසරේ ජනාධිපතිවරයාගේම මැතිවරණ ප්‍රකාශනය වන “සෞභාග්‍යය සහ තේජස පිළිබඳ දැක්ම”... එම ප්‍රතිපත්ති ප්‍රකාශය කියවන ලෙස මම මේ රටේ සියලු දෙනාගෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටිමි. ඒ ප්‍රතිපත්ති ප්‍රකාශය කියවා අද රට පත්වී ඇති තත්ත්වයට සසඳා බැලුවොත් ඔබ ඇත්තටම බඩගින්නේ මැරෙන්න කලින් හිනාවෙලා මැරෙනවා.

ප්‍රතිපත්ති ප්‍රකාශනයේ, මා වෙනත් කාරණා සම්බන්ධයෙන් කටයුතු කිරීමට පෙර; ප්‍රතිපත්ති ප්‍රකාශනයේ ඉංග්‍රීසි පිටපතේ 36 සහ 37 පිටුවල ඔහු විසින් ඉදිරිපත් කරන ලද එක් නිශ්චිත යෝජනාවක් ඇත, එහි 37 පිටුවේ ඔහු ඉතා නිශ්චිතව පවසන්නේ “ආදායම් බදු අඩු කරනු ඇත, ආර්ථික සේවා ගාස්තු සහ රඳවා ගැනීමේ බද්ද අහෝසි කරනු ඇත. දැනට පවතින වැට් බද්ද 15% සහ ජාතිය ගොඩනැගීමේ බද්ද 2% වෙනුවට 8% ක සරල අගය එකතු කළ බද්දක් හඳුන්වා දෙනු ඇත, ගෙවන්නන්ගේ බද්ද ඉවත් කරනු ලබන අතර පුද්ගලික ආදායම් බද්ද 15% ක සීමාවකට යටත් වේ. කෘෂිකාර්මික සහ කුඩා හා මධ්‍ය පරිමාණ ව්‍යවසායකයින් විසින් ගෙවිය යුතු බදු සඳහා වසර 5ක සහන කාලයක් ලබා දෙනු ඇත” යනාදී වශයෙන්.

ඔහුගේ මැතිවරණ ප්‍රකාශනයේ පවා විශාල බදු සහන ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කළේය - එය මැතිවරණ පොරොන්දුවක් විය. මට එම පිටු දෙක සභාගත කිරීමට අවශ්‍යයි, 5 වන පරිච්ඡේදය “ජනතා කේන්ද්‍රීය ආර්ථිකය” පිටු 36 සහ 37. මම එය සභාගත කරමි.

ඒ අවස්ථාවේදීම මේ රටේ මුදල් ඇමැති ගරු. මංගල සමරවීර මහතා මෙම මැතිවරණ පොරොන්දුව විශේෂයෙන් අමතා මෙම යෝජනාව ක්‍රියාත්මක කරන්නේ නම් - එය කළේ 2019 ඔක්තෝම්බර් 19 වෙනිදා බව ඔහු ප්‍රකාශ කළේය - 2019 ඔක්තෝම්බර් 19 වන දින මාධ්‍ය හමුවක් අමතමින් ඔහු ප්‍රකාශ කළේ අපේක්ෂක ගෝඨාභය රාජපක්ෂ මහතා මෙම පොරොන්දු පිළිබඳ ප්‍රශ්නය අමතමින්. මේ රට දුන්නා.

ඒ වගේම මුදල් ඇමැති මංගල සමරවීර මොකද කිව්වේ? “මේවා ක්‍රියාත්මක කළොත් ශ්‍රී ලංකාව ලෙබනනය, වෙනිසියුලාව වගේ වෙනවා. ලංකාව ලෙබනනය, වෙනිසියුලාව වගේ වෙයි. අවාසනාවකට හෝ ඔහුගේ වාසනාවට ගරු. මංගල සමරවීර අද අප අතර නැත, නමුත් ඔහුගේ අනාවැකිය සැබෑ වී ඇත, ඔහුගේ අනතුරු ඇඟවීම සැබෑ වී ඇත.

2019 ඔක්තෝම්බර් 30 වෙනිදා ට්වීට් කළා, ඒක තාම ට්විටර් එකේ තියෙනවා, මම 2019 ඔක්තෝබර් 30 වැනිදා කරපු මංගල සමරවීරගේ ට්වීට් එක සභාගත කරන්න යනවා. මේක තමයි ගෝඨාගේ බදු සැලැස්මට ශ්‍රී ලංකාව සීඝ්‍රගාමී ගුවන් යානයකට දාන්න ඕන කියලා. බංකොලොත් භාවය, පැහැර හැරීම සහ ග්‍රීක පන්නයේ ණය අර්බුදයකට පුහුණු වන්න. එම වෙනස පමණක් හීත්, ආරක්ෂක හෝ විශ්‍රාම වැටුප් අයවැයට සමාන වේ. PR නියෝජිතායතන ව්‍යාපාරික ප්‍රජාවන් සඳහා නිසැකවම උපදෙස් අවශ්‍ය නොවේ."

ගරු මන්තීතුමා සභාගත කරනවා. 2019 ඔක්තෝම්බර් 30 වන දින මාගල සමරවීරගේ ට්විටර් පණිවිඩය ද හැන්සාඩ් එකට ඇතුළත් කිරීමට නියමිතයි. ඒ නිසා අනතුරු ඇඟවීම් තිබුණේ නැහැ කියලා කියන්න බැහැ. ඒ අවස්ථාවේ රටේ මුදල් ඇමැතිවරයා මේ බව පැවසීය.

ගරු. අගමැතිට දැන් අවශ්‍ය වී ඇත්තේ පාර්ලිමේන්තු අයවැය කාර්යාලයක් පිහිටුවීමටය. පහුගිය පාර්ලිමේන්තුව කාලේ අපි ළඟ ඒ කෙටුම්පත තිබුණා ඒ සියල්ල සකස් කළාට ඒක පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට ඉදිරිපත් කළේ නැහැ. මෑතකදී ඔහු මගෙන් කෙටුම්පත ඉල්ලා සිටි අතර මම එය ඔහුට එවා ඇති අතර එය සිදුවනු ඇතැයි බලාපොරොත්තු වේ.

පාර්ලිමේන්තු අයවැය කාර්යාලයේ එක් කාර්යයක් නම්, මැතිවරණයක් පැවැත්වීමට නියමිතව සිටින විට කවුරුන් හෝ පොරොන්දුවක් - මැතිවරණ පොරොන්දුවක් - පාර්ලිමේන්තු අයවැය කාර්යාලයට වහාම එම පොරොන්දුවේ බලපෑම ගණනය කර වාර්තාවක් ප්‍රකාශයට පත් කිරීමට සිදුවනු ඇත, එය මෙසේ ය. ආර්ථිකයට බලපානු ඇත.

අවාසනාවට අපිට ඒක කියන්න පාර්ලිමේන්තු අයවැය කාර්යාලය නොතිබුණත් මුදල් ඇමතිවරයා එක පාරකට වඩා ඒක කිව්වා. නමුත් ඡන්දදායකයන් රැවටුවා, ඡන්දදායකයාට ශක්තිමත් රටක් කිව්වා, ශක්තිමත් නායකයෙක්, අද අපට ශක්තිමත් නායකයෙක් සිටින්නේ කුමක්ද? අද අපට ඇත්තේ කුමක්ද? ඡන්දදායකයින් අතර ඒ හැඟීම ඇති කිරීමට අපට ශක්තිමත් නායකයෙකු අවශ්‍යයි, මීට පෙර පාස්කු ඉරිදා ප්‍රහාරයක් ද සිදු කර, ඡන්දදායකයින් රැවටීමට ලක් විය.

මෙම බදු කප්පාදුව සැබවින්ම 2019 දෙසැම්බර් මාසයේදී ක්‍රියාත්මක කරන ලද අතර අද අප මෙම දුෂ්කරතාවයට පත්වීමට ඇති එකම හේතුව එයයි. එය එකම හේතුව බව මම නොකියමි, නමුත් එය ප්‍රේරකය විය, මන්ද අපගේ ශ්‍රේණිගත කිරීම් පහත වැටීමට පටන් ගත්තේ ඉන් පසුවය. ශ්‍රේණිගත කිරීම පහත වැටීමට පටන් ගත් විට, මුදල් නීතිය යටතේ මහ බැංකුව රහස්‍ය වාර්තා ලබා දුන් අතර, මම විශ්වාස කරන්නේ, එය රජයට අනතුරු ඇඟවූයේ, අපට තවදුරටත් ණය ගැනීමට නොහැකි වනු ඇති බවත්, 2020 ජූලි/අගෝස්තු වන විට අපව ජාත්‍යන්තර මූල්‍ය වෙලඳපොලෙන් වසා දැමූ බවත්ය.

සහ එයයි! සිදුවූයේ එයයි. ඉතින් මේ ආර්ථික අර්බුදයට තනි තනිව වගකිව යුතු පුද්ගලයා තවමත් ආණ්ඩුවේ ප්‍රධානියා. ඔහු තවමත් ජනාධිපති, සමහර අය කියනවා, “නැහැ. නැත. මේ දේශපාලනය දෙස බලන්න එපා - එය එසේ වේවා - ආර්ථික අර්බුදය සමඟ කටයුතු කරන්න"... ඔව්, හේතුව නිසා, ආර්ථික අර්බුදය සමඟ කටයුතු කිරීමට වැරදි කරන්නා ඉවත් කළ යුතුය.

වැරදි කරන්නා, වැඩිපුරම වගකිව යුතු පුද්ගලයා එම පුටුවේ තබා අර්බුදය සමඟ කටයුතු කළ නොහැක. ඔහුට එය කළ හැක්කේ කෙසේද? අගමැති ඉල්ලා අස් වුණේ ඇයි? මුළු කැබිනට් මණ්ඩලයම ඉල්ලා අස් වුණේ ඇයි? මහ බැංකු අධිපති ඉල්ලා අස්වුණේ ඇයි? භාණ්ඩාගාර ලේකම් ඉල්ලා අස් වුණේ ඇයි? ඒ සියල්ල සිදු වූයේ ඇයි? ආණ්ඩුවේ බංකුවල අසුන්ගෙන සිටි මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් 40ක් 42ක් හදිසියේම ස්වාධීන බව ප්‍රකාශ කළේ ඇයි?

දැන් මේක තමයි අලුත් වෝග් එක. මෙම පාර්ලිමේන්තුව තවදුරටත් ආණ්ඩු පක්ෂයකින් සහ විපක්ෂයකින් සමන්විත නොවන අතර, මෙම පාර්ලිමේන්තුව දැන් ස්වාධීන මන්ත්‍රීවරුන්ගෙන් - ස්වාධීන මන්ත්‍රීවරුන්ගෙන් - නව විලාසිතාවකින් සමන්විත වේ.

එක එකා නැඟිටලා කියනවා මම ස්වාධීනයි කියලා, ඒක ලොකු දෙයක්, ශීලයක් වගේ. ඔබ කෙසේ හෝ ස්වාධීන විය යුතුය, එය වෙනත් කරුණකි, නමුත් අපගේ ක්‍රමය රජයක් සහ විපක්ෂයකි. ඒකයි අපිට මධ්‍යයේ අන්තරාලයක් තියෙන්නේ - ඒකයි අපේ ස්ථාවර නියෝගවල කියන්නේ අපි එගොඩ වෙනවා මිසක් අපිට ඒ අන්තරාලය හරහා යන්න බැහැ කියලා - අපි පැති මාරු කරනවා. ඒකවත් කියන්නේ නැහැ. එයින් කියැවෙන්නේ ඔබට එම අන්තරාලය තරණය කළ නොහැකි බවයි. මේ පාර්ලිමේන්තු ක්‍රමය ඔබට දෙපැත්තක් තිබෙන එකක්. මේ පාර්ලිමේන්තු ක්‍රමය ඔබට ස්වාධීන මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් සිටින එකක් නොවේ. මෙතන ඉඳගෙන ඉන්න හැමෝම ස්වාධීන මන්ත්‍රීවරු කිව්වොත් මේ පාර්ලිමේන්තුව අසාර්ථකයි. ඒක අපේ ක්‍රමය නෙවෙයි.

ඒ නිසා ජනාධිපතිතුමා අනිවාර්යයෙන්ම ඉල්ලා අස්විය යුතුයි, එතුමාට යම් අතුරු සහනයක් ලැබිය හැකියි. රනිල් වික්‍රමසිංහ දුවගෙන ඇවිත් අගමැතිකම ගන්නවා. පාර්ලිමේන්තු ප්‍රජාතන්ත්‍රවාදයේ කොහෙද මේ වගේ අගමැතිවරයෙක් ඉන්නේ?

තනි මන්ත්‍රීවරයෙක්. ඔහුගේ පක්‍ෂයෙන් එක් අයෙක් පමණි, ඒ හයේ හතේ ආණ්ඩුවට සහන දීමටය. ජනාධිපතිතුමාට ජනවරම නැතිවෙලා, මේ දැවැන්ත ආර්ථික විපතට හේතුව වැරදිකාරයා ජනාධිපතිතුමා, ඒ නිසා එතුමා ඉවත් විය යුතුයි, ඉවත් විය යුතුයි. නැතහොත් ඔහු ඉවත් කළ යුතුය.

පාර්ලිමේන්තුවටත් ජනවරම නැතිවෙලා. ඔබ සතුව තිබූ 2/3; දැන් ඔබ සතුව ඇත්තේ කුමක්ද? ආණ්ඩුව තුළ සිටින කණ්ඩායම්, එසේ සහ එසේ කණ්ඩායම, අනෙක් පුද්ගලයාගේ කණ්ඩායම, වෙනත් පුද්ගලයෙකුගේ කණ්ඩායම හෝ තමන් ස්වාධීන මන්ත්‍රීවරුන් ලෙස හඳුන්වනු ලබයි. පාර්ලිමේන්තුවේ නීත්‍යානුකූලභාවය නැතිවෙලා, පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට ජනවරම නැතිවෙලා. මෙම ක්‍රමයේ ප්‍රතිසංස්කරණයක් සිදුවිය යුතුය. නමුත් ඊට කලින් පාර්ලිමේන්තුවත් විසුරුවා හැරිය යුතුයි, එය ස්වාධීනව විසුරුවා හැරිය යුතුයි. එය විසුරුවා හැර ඇත, මම අදහස් කළේ ඇත්ත වශයෙන්ම එය විසුරුවා හරින බවයි. එබැවින් අවම වශයෙන් විධිමත් ලෙස ඔබ දැන් එය විසුරුවා හැරිය යුතුය.

ඉතින් මේක නිකං දේශපාලනයක් කරනවා කියලා හිතන එලියෙ ඉන්න අයට මම කියනවා: නෑ! එහෙම නෙවෙයි. ඔබ මෙය නිවැරදිව සකසන තුරු, ඔබ මෙය නිවැරදි කරන තුරු ඔබ ආර්ථික ප්‍රශ්නය විසඳීමට පටන් ගන්නේ නැත. හැම ආයතනයක්ම මේ රටට කියලා තියෙනවා “දේශපාලන ස්ථාවරත්වයක් තියෙන්න ඕන කියලා ඔබ දන්නවා” මේ ස්වාධීන මන්ත්‍රීවරුන්ගේ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවත් එක්ක ඔබට දේශපාලන ස්ථාවරත්වයක් තියෙන්නේ කොහොමද? ඔබට කිසිසේත්ම ස්ථාවරත්වයක් නැත.

අපි දැන් ප්‍රශ්නයක කොටස්කාරයෙක්, අපිට විසඳුම් දෙන්න බැරි, මිනිස්සු අපි දිහා බලන් ඉන්නේ විසඳුම් කියලා අපි තේරුම් ගත යුතුයි. අපි එහෙම කරන්නේ නැහැ. අපි අඬනවා අපේ ගෙවල් වලට ගිනි තිබ්බා කියලා, අපි අඬන්නේ අරකයි අරකයි කියලා විතරයි. අපි විසඳුම් දෙන්නේ නැහැ. ඒ වගේම එතුමාගේ දේශපාලන අස්ථාවරත්වය මේ රටේ පවතින තාක්කල් අපිට විසඳුම් දෙන්න බැහැ. ප්‍රමාද වන සෑම දිනකම, ස්ථාවරත්වය ස්ථාපිත කිරීමට ප්‍රමාද වන සෑම දිනකම ඩොලර් මිලියන ගණනක් රටට වැය වේ. සෑම දිනකම ප්රමාදය.
ඒ නිසා එය කඩිනමින් විසඳිය යුතුයි අපි ප්‍රශ්නයක කොටසක්, අපි “ඔව්, අපි අපිම විසුරුවා හරින්නෙමු” කියා යෝජනාවක් සම්මත කර පාර්ලිමේන්තුව විසුරුවා හරින ලෙස ජනාධිපතිවරයාගෙන් ඉල්ලා සිටිය යුතුයි.

ජනාධිපතිවරයා විසින්ම ජාතිය අමතා අවසන් වරට දුන් ලොකුම පොරොන්දුවක් වන ඔහු එසේ පැවසූ අතර, 19 වැනි ව්‍යවස්ථා සංශෝධනය නැවත 20 වනදා ගෙන එන බවට කරුණු 2ක් කරන බව අග්‍රාමාත්‍යවරයා ඉතා පැහැදිලිව ප්‍රකාශ කළේය. ඔබ ගෙනා සංශෝධන මේ තරම් රසික රසිකාවියන් එක්ක, හිටපු අධිකරණ ඇමැතිතුමා ඉන්නවා, ඒ පනත ගෙනාවා, එකපාරටම කිව්වා “නෑ නෑ, 20 නරකයි, දැන් අපි ඒක වෙනස් කරනවා, අතහරිනවා, අහෝසි කරනවා, අපි 19 වෙනිදා ගෙන එන්නම්.

ඊට පස්සේ අපි විධායක ජනාධිපති ක්‍රමය අහෝසි කිරීමේ ක්‍රියාවලිය ආරම්භ කරනවා.” පසුගිය සති දෙක තුළ ජනාධිපතිතුමා සහ අගමැතිතුමා ඒ සහතිකය රටට ලබාදී තිබෙනවා. නමුත් ඔබ දැන් කොහෙද? 19 වැනි සංශෝධනය නැවත ගේන්නත් බැහැ. යම් කිසි කෙටුම්පතක් හැදුවා, අපිත් එක්ක, විපක්ෂයේ මන්ත්‍රීවරු, පක්ෂ නායකයන් එක්ක සාකච්ඡා කරලා, විවිධ තනුක කිරීම් එක්ක. අපි කිව්වා හරි, තවමත් කරන්න, කරන්න! සඳුදා කැබිනට් රැස්වීමේදී මොකද වුණේ?

කිසිම දෙයක් එළියට ආවේ නැහැ, ඒ පොරොන්දුව ක්‍රියාත්මක කරන්නවත් ඔබට හැකියාවක් නැහැ. නැවත ගෙන ඒමේ අතිශයින්ම පහත් අනුවාදයක් - ඔබ එය 21, 21 ලෙස හඳුන්වන්නේ ගරු. රංජිත් මද්දුමබණ්ඩාර පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට ඉදිරිපත් කර ඇත්තේ එය සැලකිය යුතු එකකි.

එතකොට අඩුම ගානේ ඔය පොරොන්දම් බැරෑරුම් නම් සම්මත කරගන්න සහයෝගයක් දෙන්න. ඔබට කෙටුම්පත අවසන් කිරීමට නොහැකි නම්, එය කිරීමට කැබිනට් මණ්ඩලයේ ඒකමතිකභාවයක් නොමැති නම්. ඉතින් කැබිනට් මණ්ඩලය අසාර්ථකයි, මේ පාර්ලිමේන්තුවට කිසිම දෙයක් කරන්න බැරි වෙලා තියෙන්නේ කිසිම ප්‍රතිසංස්කරණයකට සහය දෙන්න පුළුවන් පාර්ශ්වයක් නැති නිසා.

මේකෙන් අයින් වෙන්න නම් මේ සහන අය වැයෙන් වඩාත් සාදරයෙන් පිළිගන්නවා හැබැයි මේකේ මොනවද තියෙන්නේ කියලා බලන්න නම් බලන්න වෙනවා. ඔබේ ව්‍යවස්ථා සංශෝධන කෙටුම්පත කුමක්දැයි අපි බලා සිටිමු. අපට එය බලා සිටීමට සිදුවනු ඇත. නමුත් අපි තව දුරටත් බලා සිටින තරමට ආර්ථික අර්බුදය වඩාත් බරපතල වන අතර එයින් පීඩාවට පත්වන්නේ මේ රටේ සාමාන්‍ය පුරවැසියන් සහ දුප්පත්ම ජනතාව වන අතර අපි ඔවුන් ගැන සිතන බවක් හෝ ඔවුන් ගැන සැලකිල්ලක් දක්වන බවක් නොපෙනේ.

ta.title: "பாரிய பொருளாதார நெருக்கடியால் பெரிதும் பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்கள் இந்த நாட்டின் மிகவும் சாதாரண குடிமக்கள் மற்றும் மிகவும் வறியவர்கள், நாங்கள் அவர்களைப் பற்றி சிந்திக்கவோ அல்லது கவலைப்படுவதாகவோ தெரியவில்லை." - பாராளுமன்றத்தில் எம்.ஏ.சுமந்திரன் எம்.பி.
body_lines: (தமிழ்த் தேசியக் கூட்டமைப்பின் யாழ் மாவட்ட நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர் எம்.ஏ. சுமந்திரன் 2022 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஜூன் 08 ஆம் திகதி பாராளுமன்றத்தில் ஆற்றிய உரை)
நன்றி கௌரவ. இந்த விவாதத்தில் தலைமை வகித்து பேசும் உறுப்பினர் கௌரவ. பிரதமர் நேற்று மற்றும் துணை மதிப்பீட்டிற்கான பிரேரணை.

நாடு எதிர்கொண்டுள்ள வரலாறு காணாத பொருளாதார நெருக்கடிக்கு விடை காண இன்று நாடு பாராளுமன்றத்தை எதிர்நோக்கியுள்ளது. ஒவ்வொரு முறையும் இந்த பாராளுமன்றம் மக்களை சந்திக்கும் போது இந்த நெருக்கடிக்கு தீர்வு காண்பதற்கு சில மாற்றம், முன்னோக்கி நகர்வுகள் இருக்கும் என்ற எதிர்பார்ப்பு இருந்தது.

மக்கள் ஏமாற்றமடைந்துள்ளனர், ஏனெனில், இது அமைக்கப்பட்டபோது பாராளுமன்றமாக இருந்தது அல்லது அதன் பின்னர் அரசாங்கத்திற்கு மூன்றில் இரண்டு பங்கு ஆதரவைப் பெற்றது, மேலும் அவர்கள் ஒன்றுகூடிய அந்த 2/3 ஆதரவுடன் அவர்கள் அரசியலமைப்பில் திருத்தம் கொண்டு வந்தனர், 20 திருத்தம், மற்றும் ஜனாதிபதியின் கரங்களை பலப்படுத்தியது, 19 வது திருத்தத்தின் மூலம் ஓரளவு மீண்டும் பாராளுமன்றத்திற்கு எடுக்கப்பட்டது, அது தலைகீழாக மாறியது.

மேலும் 2019 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஜனாதிபதியின் சொந்த தேர்தல் விஞ்ஞாபனம், "செழிப்பு மற்றும் சிறப்பின் காட்சிகள்"... அந்த அறிக்கையை இந்த நாட்டில் உள்ள அனைவரையும் படிக்குமாறு நான் கேட்டுக்கொள்கிறேன். அந்த அறிக்கையைப் படித்துவிட்டு, நாடு இன்று இருக்கும் நிலைக்கு ஒப்பிட்டுப் பார்த்தால், உண்மையில் பசியால் இறப்பதற்கு முன் சிரித்துச் சாவீர்கள்.

பிரகடனத்தில், நான் மற்ற விஷயங்களைக் கையாளும் முன்; அவர் குறிப்பிட்ட ஒரு திட்டவட்டமான முன்மொழிவு, அறிக்கையின் ஆங்கில பதிப்பில் பக்கம் 36 மற்றும் 37 இல் உள்ளது, அங்கு பக்கம் 37 இல், அவர் மிகவும் குறிப்பாக "வருமான வரி குறைக்கப்படும், பொருளாதார சேவை கட்டணம் மற்றும் நிறுத்தி வைக்கப்படும் வரி நீக்கப்படும். தற்போதைய VAT 15 % மற்றும் தேசத்தை கட்டியெழுப்பும் வரி 2 % ஆகிய இரண்டிற்கும் பதிலாக 8 % என்ற எளிய மதிப்பு கூட்டு வரி அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்படும், செலுத்துபவரின் வரி நீக்கப்படும் மற்றும் தனிநபர் வருமான வரி 15 % உச்சவரம்புக்கு உட்பட்டது. விவசாயம் மற்றும் சிறு மற்றும் நடுத்தர நிறுவனங்கள் செலுத்த வேண்டிய வரிகளுக்கு 5 ஆண்டு கால அவகாசம் வழங்கப்படும்” மற்றும் பல.

அவரது தேர்தல் அறிக்கையில் கூட அறிவிக்கப்பட்ட பெரும் வரிச் சலுகைகள் - அது தேர்தல் வாக்குறுதி. அத்தியாயம் 5 “மக்கள் மையப் பொருளாதாரம்” பக்கம் 36 மற்றும் 37 என்ற தலைப்பில் அந்த இரண்டு பக்கங்களையும் நான் அட்டவணைப்படுத்த விரும்புகிறேன். நான் அதைத் தாக்கல் செய்கிறேன்.

அந்தக் காலத்திலேயே இந்நாட்டின் நிதியமைச்சர் கௌரவ. மங்கள சமரவீர, இந்த தேர்தல் வாக்குறுதியை நடைமுறைப்படுத்தினால் - 2019 ஒக்டோபர் 19 ஆம் திகதி அதனைச் செய்ததாகக் குறிப்பிட்ட மங்கள சமரவீர, 2019 ஆம் ஆண்டு ஒக்டோபர் 19 ஆம் திகதி ஊடகவியலாளர் சந்திப்பில் உரையாற்றிய அவர், இந்த வாக்குறுதிகள் தொடர்பில் வேட்பாளர் கோட்டாபய ராஜபக்ஷ உரையாற்றினார். இந்த நாட்டை கொடுத்தது.

மேலும் நிதி அமைச்சர் மங்கள சமரவீர என்ன கூறினார்? இவை நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்பட்டால் இலங்கை லெபனான் மற்றும் வெனிசுலா போன்று மாறும் எனவும் அவர் கூறினார். லெபனான், வெனிசுலா போன்று இலங்கை மாறும். துரதிர்ஷ்டவசமாக, அல்லது அவருக்கு அதிர்ஷ்டவசமாக, கௌரவ. மங்கள சமரவீர இன்று நம்மிடையே இல்லை, ஆனால் அவரது கணிப்பு உண்மையாகிவிட்டது, அவரது எச்சரிக்கை உண்மையாகிவிட்டது.

அக்டோபர் 30, 2019 அன்று அவர் ட்வீட் செய்தார், அது இன்னும் ட்விட்டரில் உள்ளது, மேலும் 2019 அக்டோபர் 30 ஆம் தேதி மங்கள சமரவீரவின் ட்வீட்டை நான் மேசையில் வைக்கப் போகிறேன். இதைத்தான் அவர் கூறினார், “கோட்டாவின் வரித் திட்டம் இலங்கையை எக்ஸ்பிரஸில் அமைக்க விரும்புகிறது. திவால், இயல்புநிலை மற்றும் கிரேக்க பாணி கடன் நெருக்கடிக்கு பயிற்சி. அந்த மாற்றம் ஹீத், பாதுகாப்பு அல்லது ஓய்வூதிய வரவு செலவுத் திட்டங்களுக்குச் சமம். PR ஏஜென்சிகள் கற்பனை செய்யும் வணிக சமூகங்களுக்கு நிச்சயமாக ஆலோசனை தேவையில்லை.
நான் மாண்புமிகு. மகலா சமரவீரவின் ட்வீட் 30 அக்டோபர் 2019 அன்று ஹன்சார்டில் சேர்க்கப்பட உள்ளது. எனவே, எச்சரிக்கைகள் இல்லை என்று கூற முடியாது. அப்போது அந்நாட்டு நிதி அமைச்சர் இதனைத் தெரிவித்தார்.

கௌரவ. பிரதமர் இப்போது பாராளுமன்ற பட்ஜெட் அலுவலகத்தை அமைக்க விரும்புகிறார். கடந்த பாராளுமன்றத்தின் போது எங்களிடம் அந்த வரைவு இருந்தது மற்றும் அது அனைத்தும் அமைக்கப்பட்டது ஆனால் அது ஒருபோதும் பாராளுமன்றத்தில் சமர்ப்பிக்கப்படவில்லை. சமீபத்தில் அவர் என்னிடம் வரைவோலை கேட்டார், நான் அதை அவருக்கு அனுப்பினேன், அது நிறைவேறும் என்று நம்புகிறேன்.

பாராளுமன்ற பட்ஜெட் அலுவலகத்தின் பணிகளில் ஒன்று, தேர்தல் நேரத்தில் யாராவது ஒரு வாக்குறுதியை - தேர்தல் வாக்குறுதியை வழங்கினால், அந்த வாக்குறுதியின் தாக்கத்தை நாடாளுமன்ற பட்ஜெட் அலுவலகம் உடனடியாக கணக்கிட்டு அறிக்கையை வெளியிட வேண்டும், இது இப்படித்தான். பொருளாதாரத்தை பாதிக்கும்.

துரதிர்ஷ்டவசமாக, அதைச் சொல்ல நாடாளுமன்ற பட்ஜெட் அலுவலகம் எங்களிடம் இல்லை, இருப்பினும் நிதி அமைச்சர் அதை ஒன்றுக்கு மேற்பட்ட முறை கூறினார். ஆனால் வாக்காளர்கள் ஏமாற்றப்பட்டனர், வாக்காளர்களுக்கு வலிமையான நாடு, வலிமையான தலைவர் என்று சொல்லப்பட்டது, இன்று நமக்கு வலிமையான தலைவர் என்ன இருக்கிறது? இன்று நம்மிடம் என்ன இருக்கிறது? வாக்காளர்கள் மத்தியில் அந்த உணர்வைத் தூண்டுவதற்கு நமக்கு ஒரு வலிமையான தலைவர் தேவை, முன்னதாக ஈஸ்டர் ஞாயிறு தாக்குதல்கள் நடத்தப்பட்டன, மேலும் வாக்காளர்கள் ஏமாற்றப்பட்டனர்.

இந்த வரிக் குறைப்புக்கள் உண்மையில் டிசம்பர் 2019 இல் நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்பட்டது மற்றும் இன்று நாம் இந்த இக்கட்டான நிலைக்குத் தள்ளப்படுவதற்கு இதுவே ஒரு முக்கிய காரணமாகும். அது மட்டுமே காரணம் என்று நான் கூறவில்லை, ஆனால் அதுதான் தூண்டுதலாக இருந்தது, ஏனென்றால் அதற்குப் பிறகுதான், ஏப்ரல் 2020 முதல் எங்கள் மதிப்பீடுகள் குறையத் தொடங்கின. மதிப்பீடு வீழ்ச்சியடையத் தொடங்கியபோது, ​​நாணயச் சட்டத்தின் கீழ் மத்திய வங்கி ரகசிய அறிக்கைகளை வழங்கியது, மேலும் நாங்கள் இனி கடன் வாங்க முடியாது என்றும், ஜூலை/ஆகஸ்ட் 2020க்குள், சர்வதேச நிதிச் சந்தைகளிலிருந்து நாங்கள் வெளியேறிவிட்டோம் என்றும் அது அரசாங்கத்தை எச்சரித்தது என்று நான் நம்புகிறேன்.

அவ்வளவுதான்! அதுதான் நடந்தது. எனவே இந்த பொருளாதார நெருக்கடிக்கு தனித்து பொறுப்பானவர் இன்னும் அரசாங்கத்தின் தலைவராக இருக்கிறார். அவர் இன்னும் ஜனாதிபதியாக இருக்கிறார், சிலர், “இல்லை. இல்லை. இந்த அரசியலைப் பார்க்காதீர்கள் - அது இருக்கட்டும் - பொருளாதார நெருக்கடியைச் சமாளிக்கவும்"... ஆம், பொருளாதார நெருக்கடியைச் சமாளிக்க தவறு செய்பவர் அகற்றப்பட வேண்டும்.

தவறு செய்பவரை, பெரும்பாலும் அந்த நாற்காலியில் வைத்து நெருக்கடியைச் சமாளிக்க முடியாது. அவர் அதை எப்படி செய்ய முடியும்? பிரதமர் ஏன் ராஜினாமா செய்தார்? ஒட்டுமொத்த அமைச்சரவையும் ராஜினாமா செய்தது ஏன்? மத்திய வங்கியின் ஆளுநர் ஏன் இராஜினாமா செய்தார்? கருவூல செயலாளர் பதவி விலகியது ஏன்? ஏன் இப்படியெல்லாம் நடந்தது? அரசாங்க பெஞ்சுகளில் அமர்ந்திருந்த 40 அல்லது 42 உறுப்பினர்கள் திடீரென ஏன் தங்களை சுயேட்சையாக அறிவித்தார்கள்?
இப்போது இது புதிய பழக்கம். இந்த பார்லிமென்ட் இனி அரசு தரப்பு மற்றும் எதிர்க்கட்சி பக்கம் இல்லை, இந்த பார்லிமென்ட் இப்போது சுயேச்சை எம்.பி.க்கள் - சுயேச்சை எம்.பி.க்கள் - புதிய ஃபேஷன்.

ஒவ்வொருவரும் எழுந்து நிற்கிறார்கள், நான் சுதந்திரமானவன், அது ஏதோ பெரிய விஷயம், சில நல்ல விஷயம் என்பது போல. நீங்கள் எப்படியும் சுதந்திரமாக இருக்க வேண்டும், அது வேறு விஷயம், ஆனால் எங்கள் அமைப்பு ஒரு அரசாங்கம் மற்றும் எதிர்க்கட்சி. அதனால்தான் நாங்கள் நடுவில் ஒரு இடைகழியை வைத்துள்ளோம் - அதனால்தான் எங்கள் நிலையியற் கட்டளைகள் கூறுகின்றன, நாம் கடக்காத வரை அந்த இடைகழியைக் கடக்க முடியாது - நாங்கள் பக்கங்களை மாற்றுகிறோம். என்று கூட சொல்லவில்லை. நீங்கள் அந்த இடைகழியைக் கடக்க முடியாது என்று அது கூறுகிறது. இந்த நாடாளுமன்ற அமைப்பு இரண்டு பக்கங்களைக் கொண்டிருக்கும் ஒன்றாகும். நீங்கள் சுயேச்சையான எம்.பி.க்களை வைத்திருக்கும் இந்த நாடாளுமன்ற முறைமையல்ல. இங்கு அமர்ந்திருக்கும் அனைவரும் சுயேச்சை எம்.பி.க்கள் என்று சொன்னால் இந்த நாடாளுமன்றம் தோல்வியடைந்துவிட்டது. அது எங்கள் அமைப்பு அல்ல.

எனவே ஜனாதிபதி கண்டிப்பாக பதவி விலக வேண்டும், அவருக்கு கெளரவ மூலம் கிடைத்த இடைக்கால நிவாரணம் இருக்கலாம். ரணில் விக்கிரமசிங்க ஓடி வந்து பிரதமர் பதவியை ஏற்றார். பார்லிமென்ட் ஜனநாயகத்தில் இப்படி ஒரு பிரதமர் உங்களுக்கு எங்கே?

ஒற்றை எம்.பி. அவரது கட்சியில் இருந்து ஒரே ஒரு நபர், ஆறு மற்றும் ஏழில் இருக்கும் அரசுக்கு நிவாரணம் வழங்க வேண்டும். ஜனாதிபதி தனது ஆணையை இழந்துவிட்டார், ஜனாதிபதி இந்த மிகப்பெரிய பொருளாதார பேரழிவை ஏற்படுத்திய தவறு செய்தவர், எனவே அவர் நகர வேண்டும், அவர் பதவி விலக வேண்டும். அல்லது அவரை நீக்க வேண்டும்.

நாடாளுமன்றமும் தனது ஆணையை இழந்துவிட்டது. உங்களிடம் 2/3 பங்கு; உன்னிடம் இப்போது என்ன இருக்கிறது? அரசாங்கத்தினுள் உள்ள குழுக்கள், அதனால் மற்றும் பல குழுக்கள், மற்ற நபரின் குழு, மற்றொரு நபரின் குழு அல்லது தங்களை சுயேட்சை எம்.பி.க்கள் என்று அழைத்துக் கொள்கிறார்கள். பாராளுமன்றம் அதன் சட்டபூர்வமான தன்மையை இழந்துவிட்டது, பாராளுமன்றம் அதன் ஆணையை இழந்துவிட்டது. இந்த அமைப்பில் மறுசீரமைப்பு செய்யப்பட வேண்டும். ஆனால் அதற்கு முன், பாராளுமன்றமும் கலைக்கப்பட வேண்டும், அது எப்படியும் சுயேச்சையாக கலைக்கப்படும். அது கலைக்கப்பட்டது, அதாவது உண்மையில் அது கரைந்துவிட்டது. எனவே குறைந்த பட்சம் முறையாக நீங்கள் அதை இப்போது கலைக்க வேண்டும்.

எனவே இது வெறும் அரசியல் என்று நினைப்பவர்களுக்கு நான் சொல்கிறேன்: இல்லை! அது அல்ல. இதை நீங்கள் சரியாக அமைக்கும் வரை, இதை சரி செய்யும் வரை நீங்கள் பொருளாதாரப் பிரச்சினையைத் தீர்க்கத் தொடங்கப் போவதில்லை. ஒவ்வொரு நிறுவனமும் இந்த நாட்டிற்கு "அரசியல் ஸ்திரத்தன்மை இருக்க வேண்டும் என்று உங்களுக்குத் தெரியும்" என்று கூறியுள்ளீர்கள், இந்த சுயேட்சை நாடாளுமன்ற உறுப்பினர்களைக் கொண்ட இந்த நாடாளுமன்றத்தில் நீங்கள் எப்படி அரசியல் ஸ்திரத்தன்மையைப் பெற்றிருக்கிறீர்கள்? உன்னிடம் நிலைத்தன்மை இல்லை.

நாம் இப்போது ஒரு பிரச்சினையின் ஒரு பகுதியாக இருக்கிறோம் என்பதை நாம் புரிந்து கொள்ள வேண்டும், எங்களால் தீர்வுகளை வழங்க முடியவில்லை, மக்கள் தீர்வுக்காக நம்மைத் தேடுகிறார்கள். நாங்கள் அதைச் செய்வதில்லை. எங்கள் வீடுகள் எரிக்கப்பட்டதை நினைத்து அழுகிறோம், இதைப் பற்றி மட்டுமே அழுகிறோம். நாங்கள் எந்த தீர்வுகளையும் வழங்குவதில்லை. மேலும் இந்த நாட்டில் அவரது வகையான அரசியல் ஸ்திரமின்மை தொடரும் வரை எங்களால் தீர்வுகளை வழங்க முடியாது. மேலும் ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் தாமதம், ஸ்திரத்தன்மையை நிலைநாட்டுவதில் தாமதம் ஏற்படும் ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் நாட்டுக்கு பல மில்லியன் டாலர்கள் செலவாகிறது. ஒவ்வொரு நாளும் தாமதம்.

எனவே அது விரைவில் சரிசெய்யப்பட வேண்டும், நாங்கள் ஒரு பிரச்சனையின் ஒரு பகுதியாக இருக்கிறோம், "ஆம், நாமே கலைப்போம்" என்று கூறி, ஒரு தீர்மானத்தை நிறைவேற்றி, பாராளுமன்றத்தை கலைக்க ஜனாதிபதியிடம் கோரிக்கை விடுக்க வேண்டும்.

தேசத்திற்கு கடந்த உரையில் ஜனாதிபதியே வழங்கிய மிகப்பெரிய வாக்குறுதிகளில் ஒன்றான அவர், 19வது திருத்தத்தை மீண்டும் கொண்டு வருவோம், 20ம் திகதி 2 விடயங்களைச் செய்வோம் என பிரதமர் மிகத் திட்டவட்டமாகத் தெரிவித்தார். இவ்வளவு ரசிகக் கட்டணத்துடன் நீங்கள் கொண்டு வந்த திருத்தம், முன்னாள் நீதித்துறை அமைச்சர் இங்கே இருக்கிறார், அவர் அந்த மசோதாவை முன்வைத்தார், திடீரென்று அவர் “இல்லை, இல்லை, 20 ஆம் தேதி மோசமானது, இப்போது அதை மாற்றுவோம், அதைக் கைவிடுவோம், அதை ரத்து செய்வோம், 19ஆம் தேதியை மீண்டும் கொண்டு வருவோம்.

அதன் பின்னர் நிறைவேற்று அதிகாரம் கொண்ட ஜனாதிபதி முறைமையை ஒழிப்பதற்கான செயற்பாடுகளை ஆரம்பிப்போம். கடந்த இரண்டு வாரங்களுக்குள் ஜனாதிபதி மற்றும் பிரதமர் இருவரும் அந்த உறுதிமொழியை நாட்டுக்கு வழங்கியுள்ளனர். ஆனால் நீங்கள் இப்போது எங்கே இருக்கிறீர்கள்? 19வது திருத்தத்தை மீண்டும் கொண்டுவர முடியாது. சில வரைவு தயாரிக்கப்பட்டு, எங்களுடன், எதிர்க்கட்சி உறுப்பினர்கள், கட்சித் தலைவர்கள் என அனைத்து விதமான நீர்த்துப்போகுடனும் விவாதிக்கப்பட்டது. சரி, இன்னும் செய், செய் என்று சொன்னோம்! திங்கட்கிழமை அமைச்சரவை கூட்டத்தில் என்ன நடந்தது?

எதுவும் வெளிவரவில்லை, அந்த வாக்குறுதியை நிறைவேற்றக் கூட உங்களால் முடியவில்லை. மீண்டும் கொண்டு வருவதற்கான மிகவும் நீர்த்துப்போகும் பதிப்பு - நீங்கள் அதை 21, 21 என்று அழைக்கிறீர்கள். ரஞ்சித் மத்துமபண்டார பாராளுமன்றத்தில் சமர்பித்துள்ளார் என்பது குறிப்பிடத்தக்கது.

உங்கள் வாக்குறுதிகளில் நீங்கள் தீவிரமாக இருந்தால், குறைந்தபட்சம் அதை நிறைவேற்ற ஆதரவளிக்கவும். உங்களால் வரைவை இறுதி செய்ய முடியாவிட்டால், அதைச் செய்வதற்கு அமைச்சரவையில் உங்களுக்கு ஒருமித்த கருத்து இல்லை என்றால். எனவே அமைச்சரவை தோல்வியடைந்துள்ளது, எந்த ஒரு சீர்திருத்தத்தையும் ஆதரிக்கும் எந்த ஒரு தரப்பும் இல்லாததால் இந்த பாராளுமன்றம் எதையும் செய்ய முடியாமல் உள்ளது.

இதிலிருந்து நாம் நகர வேண்டுமானால், இந்த நிவாரண வரவு செலவுத் திட்டத்திற்கு அதிக வரவேற்பு இருக்கும் ஆனால் இதில் என்ன இருக்கிறது என்பதை நாம் பார்க்க வேண்டும். உங்கள் அரசியலமைப்பு திருத்த வரைவு என்ன என்பதைப் பார்க்க நாங்கள் காத்திருக்கிறோம். அதற்கு நாம் காத்திருக்க வேண்டும். ஆனால் நாம் எவ்வளவு நேரம் காத்திருக்கிறோமோ, அவ்வளவு தீவிரமான பொருளாதார நெருக்கடி, அதனால் பாதிக்கப்படுபவர்கள் இந்த நாட்டின் மிகவும் சாதாரண குடிமக்களும், ஏழைகளும்தான், அவர்களைப் பற்றி நாம் சிந்திக்கவோ, கவலைப்படவோ இல்லை.

en.title: “Those who are  greatly affected by the  serious  economic crisis are the most ordinary citizens and the poorest of this country and we don’t seem to think about them or care about them.”- MA Sumanthiran MP in Parliament
body_lines: (Text of Speech  made in Parliament by TNA Jaffna District Parliamentarian  M.A. Sumanthiran on 08h June 2022)
Thank you Hon. Presiding member for the opportunity to speak at this debate on the statement made by the Hon. Prime Minister yesterday and the Motion for supplementary estimate.

The country is looking to the parliament today for answers to an unprecedented economic crisis that the country is facing. Each time this parliament meets people have had expectations that there would be some change, some forward movement to resolve this crisis.

And the people are disappointed because, this was a parliament when it was constituted or soon thereafter had two third‘s support for the government, and with that 2/3rd support that they gathered together, they brought an amendment to the constitution, the 20th amendment, and strengthened the hands of the President, which was by the 19th Amendment taken back to Parliament somewhat, that was reversed.

And the President’s own election manifesto in 2019, the “Vistas of Prosperity and splendor”… I urge everyone in this country to read that manifesto. You will die laughing before you actually die of hunger, if you read that manifesto and compare it to the state that the country is in today.

In the manifesto, before I deal with other matters; the one very specific proposal that he made, is at page 36 and 37 in the English version of the manifesto, where at page 37, he very specifically says “income tax will be reduced, economic service charge and withholding tax will be scrapped. A simple value added tax of 8 % will be introduced, replacing both the current VAT of 15 % and the Nation building tax of 2 %, payee tax will be scrapped and personal income tax will be subject to a ceiling of 15 %. 5-year moratorium will be granted on taxes payable by agriculturist and small and medium enterprises” and so on.
Huge tax reliefs announced even in his election manifesto – it was an election promise. I want to table those two pages, titled chapter 5 “People Centric economy” page 36 and 37. I am tabling it.

At that time itself, the finance minister of this country, Hon. Mangala Samaraweera, specifically addressed this election promise and he stated that if this proposal is implemented – he did that on 19th of October 2019 – he addressed a press conference on 19th of October 2019, and he addressed this issue of these promises that candidate Gotabaya Rajapaksa gave this country.

And what did Finance Minister Mangala Samaraweera say? He said, “If these are implemented Sri Lanka will become like Lebanon and Venezuela. Sri Lanka will become like Lebanon and Venezuela. Unfortunately, or fortunately for him, Hon. Mangala Samaraweera is not with us today, but his prediction has come true, his warning has come true.

On the 30th of October 2019 he tweeted, it’s still there in Twitter, and I am going to table Mangala Samaraweera’s tweet made on the 30th of October 2019. This is what he said, “Gota’s tax plan wants to set Sri Lanka on an express train to bankruptcy, default and a Greek styled debt crisis. That change alone equivalent to heath, defense or pensions budgets. Certainly doesn’t need advice for PR agencies conjured business communities”.

I am tabling Hon. Magala Samaraweera’s tweet on 30th October 2019 also to be included in the Hansard. So, one cannot say that there were no warnings. The Finance Minister of the country at that time said this.

Hon. Prime minister now wants to set up a parliamentary budget office. During the last Parliament we had that draft and all of that was set up but it was never presented to Parliament. Recently he asked me for the draft and I have sent it to him, and hope that will be done.

One of the tasks of the Parliamentary budget office is that, when due for an election somebody makes a promise – an election promise – the Parliamentary budget office will have to immediately calculate the impact of that promise and publish a report saying, this is how it will impact the economy.

Unfortunately, we did not have the Parliamentary budget office to say that, but nevertheless the minister of finance said it more than once. But voters were duped, voter were told a strong country, a strong leader, what do we have today a strong leader? What do we have today? We need a strong leader to invoke that sentiment amongst the voters, an Easter Sunday attacks was also carried out earlier, and voters were duped.

And this tax cuts were actually implemented in December 2019 and was the single most reason why we are in this predicament today. I am not saying that’s the only reason, but that was the trigger, because it was only after that, beginning April 2020 that our ratings started falling. When the rating started falling, the Central bank under the Monetary law gave confidential reports and I believe, it cautioned the government, that we will not be able to borrow anymore and by July/August 2020, we were shut out of International Financial markets.

And that’s it! That’s what happened. So the person who is single handedly responsible for this economic crisis is still the head of government. He is still president, some people are saying, “No. no. don’t look at this Politics – let that be – deal with the economic crisis”… yes of cause, to deal with the economic crisis the wrong-doer must be removed.

You can’t keep the wrong-doer, the one who is mostly responsible in that chair and deal with the crisis. How can he do that? Why did the Prime Minster resign? Why did the entire cabinet resign? Why did the governor of the Central bank resign? Why did the secretary to the treasury resign? Why did all of that happen? Why did, suddenly, 40 or 42 members who were seated in the government benches declare themselves to be independent?
Now this is the new vogue. This Parliament no longer consist of a government side and an opposition side, this Parliament now consist of independent MPs – Independent MPs – new fashion.

Each one stands up says I am independent, as if that is some big thing, some virtuous thing. You need to be independent anyway, that’s another matter, but our system is that of a government and opposition. That is why we have an Aisle in the centre – that is why our Standing Orders say that we can’t cross that aisle unless we are crossing over – we are changing sides. It doesn’t even say that. It merely says you can’t cross that aisle. This Parliamentary system is one where you have two sides. This Parliamentary system is not one where you have independent MPs. This Parliament has failed if it says everybody sitting here is an independent MP. That is not our system.

So therefore the President must definitely step down, there might be some interim relief that he has got by Hon. Ranil Wickramasinghe running and taking the position of Prime Minister. Where in the Parliamentary democracy do you have this kind of Prime Minister?

A single MP. From his party only one person, that’s to give relief to the government that’s in sixes and sevens. The President has lost his mandate, the President is the wrong-doer who caused this huge economic calamity, so he must move, he must step down. Or he must be removed.

The Parliament also has lost its mandate. 2/3rds you had; what do you have now? Groups within the government, so and so’s group, the other person’s group, another person’s group or calling themselves independent MPs. Parliament has lost its legitimacy, parliament has lost its mandate. There must be an overhaul of this system. But before that, parliament also needs to be dissolved, it is anyway dissolved into independents. It has been dissolved, I mean in actual fact it is dissolved. So at least formally you must dissolve it now.

So I say to those out there who think that this is merely playing politics: No! it is not. Until you set this right, until you set this right you are not going to even begin to address the economic issue. Every institution has told this country “you know there must be Political stability” how do you have Political stability with this parliament of independent MPs? you have no stability at all.

We must understand that we are part of a problem now, we are unable to give solutions, people are looking to us for solutions. We are not doing that. We are only crying about our houses being burnt, we are only crying about this and that and the other. We are not giving any solutions. And we can’t give solutions so long as his kind of political instability continues in this country. And every day of delay, every day of delay in establishing stability costs the country several million Dollars. Every day’s delay.
So it must be fixed fast  We are part of a problem, we must say “Yes, we’ll dissolve ourselves”, pass a resolution and request the President to dissolve Parliament.

One of the biggest promises given by the President himself in the last address to the Nation, he said so, and by the Prime Minister very categorically, stated, that they will do 2 things, that they will bring back the 19th amendment, the 20th amendment you brought with such fan fare, the former minister of justice is here, he moved that bill and suddenly he said “no, no, 20th is bad, now we will change it, we will abandon it, we’ll repeal it, we’ll bring back the 19th.

And then we’ll start the process, of abolishing executive presidency itself.” Both the President and the prime minister within the last two weeks have given the country that assurance. But where are you now? You can’t even bring back the 19th amendment. Some draft was produced, discussed with us, members of the opposition, the party leaders, with all kinds of dilution. We said alright, still do it, do it! what happened on Monday at the Cabinet meeting?

Nothing has come out, you are unable to even give effect to that promise. A highly watered down version of bringing back the –  you call it the 21st, 21st is what Hon. Ranjith Maddumabandara has presented to Parliament, that is a substantial one.

Then at least give support to that to be passed if you are serious about your promises. If you are unable to finalize the draft, if you have no unanimity in the cabinet to do that. So cabinet has failed, this Parliament is unable to do anything because there is no one side that can support any reform.

If we are to move from this, this relief budget will be most welcomed but we will have to look at it to see what there is in it. We are waiting to see what your draft amendment to the constitution is. We will have to wait for it. But the longer we wait, the more serious the economic crisis is, and the ones who are affected by that are the most ordinary citizens and the poorest of this country and we don’t seem to think about them or care about them.
